rationale.fidelity: Preserves the unchanged facility-location model, offline timing, decisions, constraints, objective, and Benders mechanism.
rationale.managerial_framing: Explains why bounds and incumbents at relevant scale may matter to planners, while noting the missing practical scale and time limit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Frames a bounded computational contribution without overstating scalability, but does not locate it in traceable literature.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels scalability as an inference and specifies appropriate comparative computational evidence.
rationale.overall: A highly faithful, concise computational framing that correctly avoids inventing online or adaptive decisions.
